description_long: This is a portable, freestanding guard rail constructed primarily from painted metal, featuring a rectangular horizontal top rail supported by two triangular side frames. The structure is painted a dark blue color with visible white scuff marks and weathering, giving it a worn, utilitarian appearance. The word 'RAZIA' is prominently stenciled in white across the top rail, suggesting it may be used for crowd control, construction, or event management in urban environments. The triangular side supports are reinforced with diagonal braces, providing stability and strength. The base consists of flat metal bars that rest on the ground, allowing the guard rail to be placed or moved as needed. There are no visible reflective markings or energy-absorbing features, and the ends of the rail are blunt and squared off.
description: A weathered, blue-painted metal guard rail with triangular side supports, white scuff marks, and 'RAZIA' stenciled on the top rail. It is freestanding and portable, designed for temporary urban use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the guard rail, the 'RAZIA' label, and the rectangular top rail with triangular side supports.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the triangular frame structure and the flat base, with the rail's thickness and bracing visible.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, showing the back of the top rail and the triangular supports, with visible weathering.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the triangular frame and base, with scuff marks and structural details.
